basic_details.job_title: GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 General Manager, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gujarat Public Service Commission (GPSC) has published the General Manager, Manager and More Posts Notification 2026 on 05 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 11 posts under the Gujarat Maritime Board (GMB). Candidates within the age range of up to 35 to 47 years (depending on post) and holding qualifications such as Bachelor’s Degree, MBA/PGDM, or Engineering Degree (Civil/Mechanical) are eligible to apply online at https://gpsc.gujarat.gov.in. The application process will be active from 05 May 2026 to 19 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply l

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026). Educational qualifications must be from recognized Universities/Institutes as per the detailed advertisement. No prior work experience is required for these posts. | Educational Qualification | Experience (wherever applicable): | General Manager: As per detailed advertisement Deputy General Manager: Minimum 5 years relevant experience Others: Experience as mentioned in the detailed notification | Age Limit | General Manager: Max 47 years Deputy General Manager: Max 42 years Manager / Dy. Executive Engineer: Max 35 years | Age Relaxation: | Unreserved: 05 years Ex-Servicemen / Officers: 05 years Physically Disabled: Up to 10 years

selection_process: Paper Subject Type Questions Marks Duration
Part-A General Studies Objective MCQ 100 100 3 Hours (180 Minutes)
Final Merit 50% Weightage of Prelim Exam Marks + 50% Weightage of Interview Marks
Result Declaration Within 10 working days from the last date of Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the GPSC OJAS portal at gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in. No offline or hard copy applications will be accepted. The online portal is active from 05/05/2026 to 19/05/2026. Candidates must apply separately for Civil and Mechanical posts if they wish to apply for both.
Visit the official GPSC website: https://gpsc.gujarat.gov.in
Go to Advertisement section and click on the relevant advertisement.
Register / Login and fill the online application form.
Upload required documents and recent photograph & signature.
Pay the application fee (if applicable) online.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.
important_instructions: No prior work experience is required for either post. Only online applications will be accepted - no offline/hard copy applications will be entertained. Age will be calculated on the last date of receipt of application (19/05/2026). Female candidates of Unreserved category are eligible for 5 years age relaxation. Educational qualifications must be as per the detailed advertisement published on the GPSC website. There is no Main Examination - selection is based on Prelim Exam + Interview only. Final merit will be based on 50% Prelim + 50% Interview marks. All correspondence and communication should be addressed to the Secretary, Gujarat Public Service Commission only. Candidates are advised to regularly visit gpsc.gujarat.gov.in and gpsc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in for all recruitment updates. All decisions of the Gujarat Public Service Commission regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026 is a selection process run by the Gujarat Public Service Commission to fill engineering and administrative posts under the Gujarat Maritime Board through Class‑1 and Class‑2 vacancies.

faq.question: Q2. Is there a special recruitment drive for PwD candidates in GMB 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, GPSC has announced a special recruitment drive for Persons with Disabilities (PwD) for Gujarat Maritime Board posts, including Executive Engineer and Assistant Engineer positions, with 7 vacancies advertised and online applications from 18 February to 5 March 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available under GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The currently active GMB recruitment drive through GPSC shows 7 PwD‑reserved vacancies for Executive Engineer and Assistant Engineer posts across Civil, Mechanical and Electrical branches, while additional general‑category GMB vacancies are included in the larger 279‑post GPSC 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q4. What posts are covered under GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026 includes technical posts such as Executive Engineer (Civil), Deputy Executive Engineer (Civil and Mechanical) and Assistant Engineer (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical), with detailed post‑wise advertisement numbers from 134/2025‑26 to 139/2025‑26.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility for GPSC GMB Executive/Assistant Engineer posts in 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates for GPSC GMB Executive and Assistant Engineer posts must generally possess a B.E./B.Tech degree in the relevant engineering discipline (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical) from a recognised university and meet the prescribed age limits and other criteria given in the official advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GPSC GMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for GPSC GMB engineering posts comprises a Preliminary Examination (objective type) followed by an Interview, as indicated for the GMB‑related advertisements where the exam type is “2 Stage (Prelim and Interview).”

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for the GPSC GMB Preliminary Examination?
faq.answer: For GPSC GMB engineering posts, the Preliminary Examination typically follows GPSC’s standard engineering pattern with an objective paper that combines General Studies and the relevant engineering subject, with 300 marks and a duration of around 3 hours.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for GPSC GMB posts in 2026?
faq.answer: Age limits for GPSC GMB posts vary by level: some Class‑1 posts have maximum ages in the mid‑40s while many Class‑2 engineering posts cap the upper age around 35 years, with relaxations for reserved categories as per Gujarat Government rules.
